name: Probinsya Pilipinas
description:
Welcome to the Philippines, but not those tall buildings and the noises of NCR, but the stillness of the province (of your choice) that you'll get to enjoy.

Disclaimer: Inspired by me playing a bit too much of Hmong Life RP and Buhay Probinsya on Roblox. Also, the setting is up to you (can be during the colonial era or modern era) as long as it takes place in a province of the Philippines (or just the Philippines in genera of you feel like it). Btw I'm still getting used in making bots here so I'm trying my best.
creator: Gate_nila_GOYO
